name: 上げる
description: Auxiliary verb meaning to finish doing something completely or thoroughly

name: あまり
description: Expresses 'so much that' or excessive degree leading to a result

name: あまりにも
description: Expresses 'too much' or 'excessively' with stronger emphasis than あまり

name: 合う
description: Auxiliary verb meaning to do something together or mutually

name: ばいい
description: Expresses suggestion or advice meaning 'should do' or 'it would be good if'

name: ばよかった
description: Expresses regret meaning 'should have done' or 'would have been better if'

name: ば～ほど
description: Expresses proportional relationship meaning 'the more... the more'

name: ば～のに
description: Expresses regret or contrary expectation meaning 'would have' or 'if only'

name: ばかりで
description: Expresses 'only' or 'just' with negative connotation, describing limitation

name: ばかりでなく
description: Expresses 'not only... but also' to add additional information

name: べきだ
description: Expresses strong obligation or moral duty meaning 'should do' or 'must do'

name: べきではない
description: Expresses strong prohibition meaning 'should not do' or 'must not do'

name: 別に～ない
description: Expresses 'not really' or 'not particularly' to downplay or deny something

name: ぶりに
description: Expresses 'for the first time in (period of time)' indicating a long interval

name: 中
description: Expresses 'currently', 'during', or 'throughout' a period or state

name: だけ
description: Expresses extent or degree meaning 'as much as' or 'to the extent that'

name: だけでなく
description: Expresses 'not only... but also' to add additional information

name: だけど
description: Casual conjunction meaning 'however' or 'but' to show contrast

name: だらけ
description: Expresses 'full of' or 'covered with' something undesirable

name: どんなに～ても
description: Expresses 'no matter how much' or 'regardless of how' with concessive meaning

name: どうしても
description: Expresses 'no matter what', 'at any cost', or 'by all means'

name: ふりをする
description: Expresses 'to pretend' or 'to act as if' something is true

name: ふと
description: Adverb meaning 'suddenly', 'accidentally', or 'unexpectedly'

name: がち
description: Expresses tendency or inclination meaning 'tend to' or 'often'

name: がたい
description: Expresses 'very difficult to' or 'impossible to' do something

name: 気味
description: Suffix meaning '-like', 'tending to', or 'showing signs of'

name: ごとに
description: Expresses 'each', 'every', or 'at intervals of' for regular occurrence

name: ほど
description: Expresses degree, extent, or upper limit meaning 'to the extent of'

name: ほど～ない
description: Expresses comparison meaning 'is not as... as' for negative comparison

name: 一度に
description: Expresses 'all at once' or 'at the same time' for simultaneous action

name: いくら～ても
description: Expresses 'no matter how much' or 'regardless of how much'

name: 一方だ
description: Expresses 'more and more' or 'continue to' for ongoing progression

name: 一体
description: Emphatic word meaning 'what on earth' or 'just what' for strong questioning

name: じゃない
description: Sentence-ending particle for confirmation meaning 'isn't it' or 'right'

name: か何か
description: Expresses 'or something' to suggest uncertainty or vague alternatives

name: かける
description: Auxiliary verb meaning 'half-', 'not yet finished', or 'in the middle of'

name: から〜にかけて
description: Expresses 'from A to B' or 'through' for time or location ranges

name: 代わりに
description: Expresses 'instead of' or 'in exchange for' to show substitution

name: 結果
description: Expresses 'as a result of' or 'after' to show consequence

name: 結局
description: Adverb meaning 'after all', 'eventually', or 'in the end'

name: 決して～ない
description: Express 'never' or 'by no means' with strong emphasis on absolute negation

name: 切れない
description: Express inability to complete something or that something is too much to finish

name: きり
description: Express 'only', 'just', or indicate something hasn't happened since a certain time

name: 切る
description: Express doing something completely to the end or finishing thoroughly

name: っけ
description: Casual suffix used to confirm something or recall information

name: 込む
description: Express moving inside something or doing something for a long time intensively

name: こそ
description: Emphasize 'for sure', 'precisely', or 'definitely' with strong emphasis

name: こと
description: Express obligation or necessity, meaning '(must) do'

name: ことから
description: Express reasoning 'from the fact that' or 'because of the fact that'

name: ことになっている
description: Express that something is expected to happen or has been decided

name: ことはない
description: Express 'there is no need to' or 'no possibility that'

name: ことは～が
description: Express 'although' or 'but' when acknowledging one thing while contrasting it

name: くらい・ぐらい
description: Express approximation 'about' or extent 'to the degree that'

name: くせに
description: Express criticism meaning 'although' or 'despite the fact that' with negative nuance

name: まるで
description: Express comparison meaning 'as if', 'as though', or 'just like'

name: まさか
description: Express disbelief meaning 'there's no way' or 'that's impossible'

name: めったに～ない
description: Express rarity meaning 'hardly', 'rarely', or 'seldom'

name: も～ば～も
description: Express 'both...and' or 'either...or' listing multiple items

name: もしかしたら
description: Express possibility meaning 'perhaps', 'maybe', or 'by chance'

name: もしも〜たら
description: Express hypothetical condition meaning 'if' or 'supposing that'

name: 向け
description: Express target audience meaning 'intended for' or 'aimed at'

name: 向き
description: Express suitability meaning 'suitable for' or 'appropriate for'

name: むしろ
description: Express preference meaning 'rather', 'instead', or 'better'

name: ながらも
description: Express contrast meaning 'but', 'although', or 'despite' with formal nuance

name: ないことはない
description: Express possibility meaning 'can do' or 'is not impossible to' with double negative

name: ないと
description: Express necessity meaning 'must do' or 'unless/if you don't'

name: なかなか
description: Express degree meaning 'quite', 'pretty', 'rather', or 'just not' depending on context

name: なんか / なんて
description: Express examples, modesty, or making light of something in casual speech

name: 直す
description: Express doing something again or doing something over to correct it

name: なるべく
description: Express effort meaning 'as much as possible' or 'if possible'

name: なぜなら
description: Express reason meaning 'because' or 'the reason is' to introduce explanation

name: んだって
description: Express hearsay meaning 'I hear that' or 'heard that' in casual speech

name: に違いない
description: Express strong certainty meaning 'I'm sure/certain' or 'no doubt that'

name: に反して
description: Express opposition meaning 'against', 'contrary to', or 'in contrast to'

name: にかけて
description: Express time period meaning 'over (a period)' or scope 'concerning/regarding'

name: に関する
description: Express relation meaning 'about', 'regarding', or 'related to'

name: にかわって
description: Express substitution meaning 'instead of', 'replacing', or 'on behalf of'

name: に比べて
description: Express comparison meaning 'compared to' or 'in comparison to'

name: に慣れる
description: Express habituation meaning 'to be used to something' or 'to get accustomed to'

name: において
description: Express location or context meaning 'in', 'at (place)', 'regarding', or 'as for'

name: にしたがって
description: Expresses that something changes in accordance with or in proportion to something else; as one thing changes, another changes accordingly

name: にしても
description: Expresses 'even if' or 'even though'; indicates that regardless of the condition mentioned, the result remains the same

name: にしては
description: Expresses 'for' or 'considering'; used when something is unexpected or unusual given the circumstances

name: に対して
description: Expresses direction of action, attitude, or feeling towards someone or something; 'towards', 'against', or 'regarding'

name: にとって
description: Expresses 'to' or 'for' someone; indicates from whose perspective or for whose benefit something is considered

name: について
description: Expresses 'concerning', 'regarding', or 'about'; used to indicate the topic or subject matter being discussed

name: につれて
description: Expresses proportional change; as one thing changes, another changes accordingly; 'as', 'in proportion to'

name: には
description: Expresses purpose or requirement; 'for the purpose of', 'in order to', or indicates what is needed for something

name: によると/によれば
description: Expresses 'according to' or 'based on'; used to cite a source of information

name: によって/による
description: Expresses means, method, cause, or agent; 'by means of', 'due to', 'because of', or indicates who/what performs an action

name: のでしょうか
description: Polite way to ask a question; more formal and softer than だろうか; expresses uncertainty or seeks confirmation

name: を中心に
description: Expresses 'centered on' or 'focused on'; indicates that something is the main focus or center of activity

name: をはじめ
description: Expresses 'starting with' or 'for example'; used to give examples with the first one being representative

name: を込めて
description: Expresses doing something with a particular feeling or intention; 'filled with', 'putting one's heart into'

name: を通じて/を通して
description: Expresses 'through', 'via', or 'throughout'; indicates the means, method, or duration of something

name: おかげで
description: Expresses gratitude or positive result; 'thanks to', 'owing to', 'because of' (used for positive outcomes)

name: っぱなし
description: Expresses leaving something in a continuous state; 'leaving something on/open/running' without stopping or changing

name: っぽい
description: Expresses resemblance or tendency; 'seems like', 'somewhat', '-ish', or indicates something easily happens

name: さえ
description: Expresses 'even' or emphasis; indicates an extreme example or minimum requirement

name: さえ～ば
description: Expresses 'if only' or 'as long as'; indicates that one condition is sufficient for a desired result

name: 際に
description: Expresses 'when', 'at the time of', or 'in the case of'; used for formal or important occasions

name: 最中に
description: Expresses 'while', 'during', or 'in the middle of'; indicates something happens during an ongoing action

name: さらに
description: Expresses 'furthermore', 'moreover', or 'even more'; used to add additional information or emphasis

name: さて
description: Conjunction meaning 'well', 'now', or 'then'; used to change topics or move to the next point in conversation

name: せいで
description: Expresses negative cause or blame; 'because of', 'due to', 'as a result of' (used for negative outcomes)

name: せいぜい
description: Expresses 'at most', 'at best', or 'to the utmost'; indicates the maximum limit or extent of something

name: しばらく
description: Expresses 'for a while', 'for some time', or 'for a moment'; indicates a moderate duration of time

name: しかない
description: Expresses 'have no choice but to' or 'can only'; indicates that there is only one option available

name: そのために
description: Expresses 'for that reason', 'hence', or 'because of that'; indicates purpose or cause-effect relationship

name: それとも
description: Expresses 'or' or 'or else'; used to present an alternative option in questions

name: そうもない
description: Expresses 'very unlikely to' or 'showing no signs of'; indicates something is improbable or impossible

name: すでに
description: Expresses 'already' or 'previously'; indicates that something has been completed or occurred before now

name: すなわち
description: Expresses 'in other words', 'namely', or 'that is to say'; used to clarify or rephrase something

name: 数量+は
description: Expresses 'at least' when used with quantities; indicates a minimum amount or number

name: たものだ
description: Expresses past habits or nostalgic recollection; 'used to do', 'would often do' (reminiscing about the past)

name: たとたん
description: Expresses 'as soon as' or 'the moment that'; indicates immediate succession of events

name: たびに
description: Expresses 'whenever' or 'every time'; indicates that something happens repeatedly under the same conditions

name: ために
description: Expresses purpose or benefit; 'for', 'in order to', 'for the sake of', or indicates the reason or beneficiary

name: 確かに
description: Expresses certainty or agreement; 'surely', 'certainly', 'indeed'; used to confirm or acknowledge something

name: たて
description: Expresses something just completed or freshly done; 'just done', 'newly made', indicates recent completion

name: たとえ～ても
description: Even if... is the case; expresses that something will happen regardless of the condition

name: 例えば
description: For example; used to introduce an example or illustration

name: たって
description: Even if; even though; no matter how; expresses that the result won't change regardless

name: てばかりいる
description: Only; nothing but; expresses doing only one thing continuously

name: てごらん
description: (Please) try to; (please) look; gentle imperative form encouraging someone to try

name: てはじめて
description: Not until; only after [x] did I; expresses that something happens for the first time after doing something

name: てからでないと
description: Must first do; cannot do without; expresses that one action must be completed before another

name: てしょうがない
description: Can't help but; very; extremely; expresses inability to control a feeling or situation

name: て済む
description: Sufficient by; resolve by; expresses that something can be settled or resolved by doing an action

name: てはいけないから
description: In order to not; because one must not; expresses reason for avoiding an action

name: ている場合じゃない
description: This is no time to be doing; expresses that the current situation doesn't allow for a particular action

name: 的
description: Change noun into na-adjective or adverb; suffix that creates adjectives meaning 'like' or 'characteristic of'

name: ても始まらない
description: Even if you... it's no use; expresses that doing something won't lead to any progress

name: てもかまわない
description: It doesn't matter if; it's okay if; expresses permission or indifference

name: てもしょうがない
description: There's no point to; it's no use to; expresses futility of an action

name: と言えば
description: Speaking of; when you talk of; used to change topics or add related information

name: といい / たらいい
description: It would be nice if; should; I hope; expresses wishes or suggestions

name: といっても
description: Although I say; although one might say; expresses qualification or limitation of a statement

name: ということだ
description: I heard; it means; in other words; expresses hearsay or explanation

name: というのは
description: This means; because; that is to say; used to explain or define something

name: と言うと
description: Speaking of; when you say; used to respond to or elaborate on a topic

name: というより
description: Rather than; more than; used to correct or refine a previous statement

name: とみえる / とみえて
description: It seems that; appears that; expresses inference based on observation

name: とすれば
description: In the case of; assuming; if A then B; expresses hypothetical reasoning

name: と共に
description: Together with; at the same time as; expresses simultaneous actions or accompaniment

name: 途中で
description: On the way; in the middle of; expresses interruption or something happening during a process

name: ところで
description: By the way; used to change topics in conversation

name: ところが
description: Even so; however; even though; expresses unexpected contrast or contradiction

name: とおりに
description: In the same way as; in the way; as; expresses doing something exactly as described

name: 通す
description: To do until the end; to continually do; expresses persistence or completion

name: として
description: As; in the role of; expresses capacity, role, or standpoint

name: とても～ない
description: Cannot possibly be; hardly; expresses impossibility or extreme difficulty

name: とは限らない
description: Not necessarily so; is not always true; expresses that something is not always the case

name: つい
description: Accidentally; unintentionally; expresses doing something without meaning to

name: ついに
description: Finally; at last; in the end; expresses the culmination of a long process

name: ついでに
description: While; incidentally; at the same time; expresses doing something as an additional action

name: つまり
description: In other words; in summary; in short; used to clarify or summarize

name: つもりだった
description: I thought I; I believe I did; expresses past intention or belief

name: つもりで
description: With the intention of doing; expresses acting with a particular mindset or purpose

name: うちに
description: While; before; expresses doing something during a limited time period

name: 上で
description: Expresses 'upon', 'after', 'when', 'for', or 'in order to' - indicates something done as a basis or prerequisite for another action

name: 上に
description: Expresses 'as well', 'not only... but also' - adds additional information or emphasizes multiple qualities

name: は別として
description: Expresses 'aside from', 'whether or not' - sets something aside from consideration

name: はもちろん
description: Expresses 'not to mention', 'not only... but also' - emphasizes that something is obvious while adding more information

name: は～で有名
description: Expresses 'famous for' - indicates what someone or something is well-known for

name: わけだ
description: Expresses 'for that reason', 'no wonder' - indicates a logical conclusion or natural result

name: わけではない
description: Expresses 'it doesn't mean that' - denies or clarifies that something is not necessarily the case

name: わけがない
description: Expresses 'there is no way that' - strongly denies the possibility of something

name: わけにはいかない
description: Expresses 'must not', 'cannot afford to' - indicates something that cannot be done due to circumstances or social expectations

name: 割に
description: Expresses 'considering', 'for', 'despite' - indicates something unexpected given the circumstances

name: わざと
description: Expresses 'on purpose', 'intentionally' - indicates deliberate action

name: わざわざ
description: Expresses 'to go to the trouble of' - indicates making special effort or going out of one's way

name: よりも
description: Expresses 'rather than', 'more than' - makes comparisons with emphasis

name: ようがない
description: Expresses 'there is no way to', 'it's impossible to' - indicates complete impossibility of doing something

name: ような気がする
description: Expresses 'have a feeling that', 'feels like', 'seems like' - indicates intuitive impression or vague feeling

name: ように
description: Expresses 'in order to', 'so that' - indicates purpose or desired outcome

name: ように見える
description: Expresses 'to look', 'to seem', 'to appear' - indicates visual impression or appearance

name: ようとしない
description: Expresses 'not try to', 'not make an effort to' - indicates unwillingness to attempt something

name: ようとする
description: Expresses 'try to', 'attempt to', 'be about to' - indicates effort or intention to do something

name: ずに
description: Expresses 'without doing' - indicates performing an action without doing something else

name: ずにはいられない
description: Expresses 'can't help but feel', 'can't help but do' - indicates inability to resist doing something

name: ずつ
description: Expresses 'apiece', 'each', 'at a time' - indicates equal distribution or gradual progression
